buildCommand: npx expo export --platform web && node inject-gtm.js

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://vercel.live; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://api.stripe.com https://js.stripe.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://analytics.google.com https://www.googletagmanager.com https://region1.google-analytics.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.supabase.co; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-src https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://js.stripe.com; object-src 'none';
